issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases, focusing only on happy paths.

scenarios.name: Reversible Knex migration with backfill
scenarios.rationale: Treatment produces a timestamped file with up/down functions, batched backfill keyed on last_login_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days', and a working dropColumn rollback; baseline writes only up() with no down() and no timestamp prefix.

scenarios.name: CI workflow: migrate up, rollback, migrate up
scenarios.rationale: Treatment defines a Postgres services container and runs migrate:latest, migrate:rollback --all, then migrate:latest again to confirm clean state; baseline runs migrate:latest once with no rollback step and no Postgres service.
